title: Binary Simplification as an Effective Tool in Metabolomics Data Analysis.

content: S-EPMC8621519 PMC8621519 Binary Simplification as an Effective Tool in Metabolomics Data Analysis. Metabolomics aims to perform a comprehensive identification and quantification of the small molecules present in a biological system. Due to metabolite diversity in concentration, structure
